subject: Project Management
title: The Scrum Master Market
description: A quick win: understand The Scrum Master Market.

hook.text: In 2005, barely anyone had heard of a Scrum Master. By 2020, it was one of tech's hottest titles.

buildup.text: The Scrum Alliance has certified over a million Scrum Masters. Average U.S. salary topped $100K.

discovery.text: A two-day course and exam opened the door to a six-figure career. Demand outpaced supply for years.

twist.text: Critics say the low barrier created a flood of certified-but-ineffective Scrum Masters.

climax.text: The role that was supposed to make itself unnecessary became an entire career category.

punchline.text: The temporary role became a permanent job title.

quiz.question: How quickly can someone become a Certified ScrumMaster?
options: In about two days with a course and exam
